definitions.name: filter:where:rn
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where rn equals 1

definitions.name: rn
definitions.business_description: Row ranking (used for deduplication or ordering)
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null
definitions.technical_expression: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pat_enc_hsp.pat_id ORDER BY pat_enc_hsp.hosp_admsn_time DESC)

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_DISCH_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital discharge date and time is not null
